titleStmt.title: SII 6.957: original edition by K. V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 957. (A.R. No. 310 of 1899). IN THE TWENTY-NINTH NICHE OF THE SAME VERANDAH.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī . cūrāṁḍināyakasuto drāviḍaḥ śūdrasattamaḥ tālāḍiviṣayavyakta
kaluvacēṟuvadasthiraḥ . 1 Ōlamaṁgalagōtrāṁkabhūṣaṇō māṁkināyakaḥ .
kāmāṁḍināmadhēyāyāḥ svamātuḥ puṇyapṛddhayē . 2 śākābdē
ratnadhātrīnayanaśaśiyutē caitrakriṣṇatritīyāsaṁyuktē jīvavārē ha
riśikharijuṣaḥ śrīnṛsiṁhasya viṣṇōḥ . prādādgāstatvasaṁkhyāḥ pratidi
navihitākhaṁḍadāpasya siddhye tvācaṁdrā¨rkābdhitāraṁ varadagirimu
nēssanmanaḥprītipū¨rvvaṁ . 3 svasti śrī . śakava¨rṣaṁbulu 1219 gunēṁṭṭi śrī
madanaṁtava¨rmma pratāpavīranarasiṁhadēva prapa¨rddhamāna vijayarājya
saṁvatsa 23 gu śrahi caitra kṛṣṇa 3 guruvāramuna tālāḍunāṁḍu ka
ṭṭuna kaluvacēṟu drāviḍakula Ōlamaṁgalagōtrajuṁḍaina sūrāṁḍi
nāyaku koḍku māṁkināyaku talli kāmāṁḍiAmma śrīnarasiṁhanā
thuni saṁnidhiyaṁdu nityamunnu tanaku puṇyamugānu Oka Akhaṁ
ḍadīpamu veluṁguṭaku peṭṭina mōdālu IruvaĒniṁṭi lekka 25 Ī bhaṁ
ḍāramaṁdu dīpadaṁḍunaku mūlyamupeṭṭina gaṁḍamāḍa 1 Ī dha¨rmmu
pu Ācaṁdrā¨rkkasthāyigā cellaṁgalādu Ī dha¨rmmuvu śrīvaiṣṇavula rakṣa .
Digital edition of SII 6.957 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
